testCases.testName: Display Case Form on Case Load

verified: FormViewer displays currentCase.name (line 71 in FormViewer.tsx)
FormViewer displays currentCase.id (line 72 in FormViewer.tsx)
Form displays all formFields from AppContext (line 98-144)
Field counter shows filledFields/totalFields (lines 63-64, 76)
Required fields marked with asterisk (line 102)
integrationCourseFormTemplate has 7 fields (mockData.ts lines 19-27)
formFields is tied to currentCase, not folders (AppContext.tsx line 25)
FormViewer does not depend on folder selection
Form title uses currentCase.name (FormViewer.tsx line 71)
No folder-based form switching logic found
toggleFolder only changes isExpanded state (AppContext.tsx lines 165-174)
updateFormField updates formFields state (AppContext.tsx lines 89-94)
updateFormField also updates allCaseFormData[currentCase.id] (lines 96-101)
Form data persisted to localStorage (AppContext.tsx lines 318-336)
No folder-dependent state clearing logic
Form state managed at case level

setFormFields function available in AppContext (line 26)

isAdminMode state controls admin panel visibility (AppContext.tsx line 42)
details.notes: UI implementation verified. Forms tab exists and can edit current case form fields.

verified: WebSocket sendChatMessage includes formSchema (AppContext.tsx line 283)

testCases.errorMessage: Missing /fillForm slash command in frontend command list. Backend form parser tool exists but command not exposed in UI.

verified: addNewCase initializes empty form data (AppContext.tsx lines 127-136)

createNewCase creates case with appropriate folder structure (mockData.ts lines 71-83)
Each new case gets independent form data in allCaseFormData
switchCase handles missing form data gracefully (AppContext.tsx line 114)
Falls back to initialFormFields with empty values if no data exists
No crashes or errors - uses || operator for fallback

verified: Form data persisted to localStorage on every update (AppContext.tsx lines 318-336)

No locking mechanism - acceptable for POC as per requirements
details.notes: POC implementation uses last-write-wins which is acceptable per requirements

verified: switchCase checks if targetCase exists before switching (AppContext.tsx line 106)
Returns early if case not found (implicit by if block)

details.reason: Performance test requires runtime measurement with timer instrumentation

All field IDs are unique within each template

Field types are valid: 'text', 'date', 'select', 'textarea'
Select fields include options array
Required fields marked with required: true

Field label editing implemented with Input onChange (updates label)

Full CRUD operations available via setFormFields state updater
Changes persist automatically via AppContext localStorage integration
UI displays all form fields in editable list

implementationNotes.architecture: Case-level form management successfully implemented with proper state isolation
keyFeatures: Form data persists across folder navigation within same case
Each case has independent form data stored in allCaseFormData mapping
Form templates defined per case type (integration_course, asylum_application, family_reunification)
WebSocket integration for form auto-fill capability
strengths: Clean separation between case-level and folder-level concerns
Multiple form templates support different case types
Graceful fallback handling for missing form data
weaknesses: Missing /fillForm slash command in UI command list
No automated tests exist yet (only test specifications)

recommendations.description: Add /fillForm slash command to slashCommands array in mockData.ts
recommendations.suggestedFix: Add { command: '/fillForm', label: 'Fill Form', description: 'Extract data from document to form fields', icon: 'FileInput' } to slashCommands array

recommendations.description: Implement automated tests as specified in F-005-tests.md
recommendations.suggestedFix: Create unit tests with Jest/React Testing Library and E2E tests with Playwright as outlined in test documentation

recommendations.description: Add JSDoc comments to switchCase and updateFormField functions
recommendations.suggestedFix: Document the case switching and form data persistence logic for maintainability
